dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal c & b Starc 6 (3b 0x4 1x6 2m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: That looks out, Jaiswal wants to check the full toss for height but that looked fair. Umps refer it. 143ks around the waist. Jaiswal was on the crease and was taken aback by the pace and trajectory of the ball - it didn't dip at all. He went back in the crease a touch and looked to drive it down the ground. Ball hit high on the sticker and went towards short leg, was in the air for a while, so it was an easy catch for Starc

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi b Jamieson 4 (2b 1x4 0x6 11m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: Whatta yorker! Big swing in at 135ks, hits the crease on the fulll; Sooryavanshi had a slightly open stance, planted feet as he tried to drive the ball through cover. A thin inside edge took it back to the stumps. Jamieson is pumped, he pumps his fists while charging down the pitch and maintaining eye contact with VS. Karun Nair pumps his fists in the dugout

dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel c Stubbs b Patel 42 (30b 4x4 1x6 52m) SR: 140

dismissalComment.html: Oh no... That's a premature end to the party for him, just as he was getting going. Back of a length delivery, spinning into the stumps. There to be hit: he was on the backfoot, but couldn't elevate it over deep midwicket

dismissalText.commentary: Riyan Parag c Patel b Starc 90 (50b 8x4 5x6 75m) SR: 180

dismissalComment.html: Parag's been off-strike for a while, and it shows! Parag won't get to a century today, he's shattered as he walks back in. 140.5 clicks, holds a little in the pitch but Parag takes his eyes off the ball right as the ball climbs more than he expected. Cramps him up on the drive, and it is lobbed in the air and right to Axar Patel running in from extra cover

dismissalText.commentary: Ravindra Jadeja c Sharma b Starc 20 (14b 1x4 1x6 27m) SR: 142.85

dismissalComment.html: And now Jadeja has to depart. 127.6 clicks - Starc goes for a slower one, short and outside off. Jadeja jumps at this to play it behind him, quite fine, but the lack of pace does his timing in. Straight to Ashutosh Sharma at backward point

dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal c & b Starc 6 (3b 0x4 1x6 2m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: That looks out, Jaiswal wants to check the full toss for height but that looked fair. Umps refer it. 143ks around the waist. Jaiswal was on the crease and was taken aback by the pace and trajectory of the ball - it didn't dip at all. He went back in the crease a touch and looked to drive it down the ground. Ball hit high on the sticker and went towards short leg, was in the air for a while, so it was an easy catch for Starc

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi b Jamieson 4 (2b 1x4 0x6 11m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: Whatta yorker! Big swing in at 135ks, hits the crease on the fulll; Sooryavanshi had a slightly open stance, planted feet as he tried to drive the ball through cover. A thin inside edge took it back to the stumps. Jamieson is pumped, he pumps his fists while charging down the pitch and maintaining eye contact with VS. Karun Nair pumps his fists in the dugout

dismissalText.commentary: Riyan Parag c Patel b Starc 90 (50b 8x4 5x6 75m) SR: 180

dismissalComment.html: Parag's been off-strike for a while, and it shows! Parag won't get to a century today, he's shattered as he walks back in. 140.5 clicks, holds a little in the pitch but Parag takes his eyes off the ball right as the ball climbs more than he expected. Cramps him up on the drive, and it is lobbed in the air and right to Axar Patel running in from extra cover

dismissalText.commentary: Pathum Nissanka lbw b Jadeja 62 (33b 6x4 3x6 48m) SR: 187.87

dismissalComment.html: Nissanka's barbecued himself. He will review but this looks bleak for him. 101ks fullish ball from around the wicket landed on off and went under the bat as Nissanka switched his stance for the reverse sweep. The front leg is in front of off stump and the ball's hit it low on the shin. Impact in line with off and it'd go on to smash off. Jadeja was celebrappealing and that's why

dismissalText.commentary: KL Rahul c Ferreira b Archer 75 (40b 6x4 5x6 87m) SR: 187.5

dismissalComment.html: And NOW KL is gone! This is the big twist in the tale that they wanted Archer to produce. The ball was there to be hit once more. On a length and he swiped across the line, but he found the fielder right at deep mid-wicket. Just couldn't get the power he needed on the shot to get it over the fielder

dismissalComment.html: And NOW KL is gone! This is the big twist in the tale that they wanted Archer to produce. The ball was there to be hit once more. On a length and he swiped across the line, but he found the fielder right at deep mid-wicket. Just couldn't get the power he needed on the shot to get it over the fielder
